qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Denial of Service via Stack Overflow in Deeply Nested Schema Processing
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different root cause: unbounded recursion in normalizeSchema (main.js:203-220) vs the advisory's prototype pollution via String.prototype.startsWith override bypass (main.js:564). Different vulnerability class, different vulnerable function, different code path.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Input Validation Bypass via Undeclared Nested Properties in Strict Mode
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different root cause: walk() creating intermediate objects and validate() skipping nested keys for object properties (main.js:565-579, 153-160) vs the advisory's prototype pollution via String.prototype.startsWith override bypass (main.js:564). While the set() function at lines 565-579 is near the advisory's line 564, the described vulnerability mechanism is entirely different — validation gap vs overridable guard function.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described vulnerability: prototype pollution via overriding String.prototype.startsWith to bypass the guard at main.js:564, which allows config.set('constructor.prototype.polluted', ...) to pollute Object.prototype. The prototype_pollution_mitigated finding (non_qualifying_vuln) incorrectly concluded the vulnerability is fully mitigated in v6.2.4, contradicting the advisory. The two qualifying findings describe different root causes: stack overflow via unbounded recursion in normalizeSchema, and validation bypass via walk()/validate() gap for nested keys.
evidence: Advisory describes prototype pollution via String.prototype.startsWith override bypass at main.js:564
stack_overflow_dos: unbounded recursion in normalizeSchema at main.js:203-220 — unrelated root cause and code
validation_bypass: walk() intermediate object creation + validate() skipping nested keys at main.js:565-579,153-160 — different mechanism from startsWith bypass

prototype_pollution_mitigated (non_qualifying_vuln): correctly identifies protection locations but incorrectly concludes full mitigation, missing the startsWith override bypass described by the advisory
